Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean William A. Hagan records
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean
Hagan, William Arthur, 1893-1963.
24-1-120
19.3 cubic feet. 19.3 cubic feet.
1932-1950 Correspondence, subject files. Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during William A. Hagan's tenure as dean. Collection material in English 2073506
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel and Kerry Gilfillan
Date completed:
July 2004
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel and Kerry Gilfillan, 2004
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
William A. Hagan was the fourth Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. His term ran from 1932-1959. Hagan also served on the administrative committee that governed the college from 1931-1932, after the death of the third dean, Pierre A. Fish. Also on that committee were Drs. Earl Sunderville and Raymond Russel Birch. Professor Myron G. Fincher served as Acting Dean from 1943-1944 while Dean Hagan was in Germany
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during William A. Hagan's tenure as dean. Hagan served as dean from 1932-1959, but the most recent material in this collection only dates to1950, so additional material may be located in the future and added to the collection. Some information about the intervening years may be found in collection # 24-01-1646, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, 1959-1974.
RELATED MATERIAL
RMC Collection # 24-01-1646, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, 1959-1974
RMC Collection #s 24-1-482 amd 24-1-1516, William A. Hagan Papers.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
Organized in several chronological series based on the original order of the collection.
SERIES LIST
Series I. 1932-1935 Boxes: 1-2, 19
Series II. 1937-1939 Boxes 2-5, 19
Series III. 1939-1941 Boxes 5-6
Series IV. 1940-1942 Boxes: 6-9, 19
Series V. 1942-1943 Boxes: 9-10
Series VI. 1943-1947 Boxes: 10-14, 19
Series VII. 1947-1950 Boxes: 14-18, 20
Cite As:
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, #24-01-120. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching. Hagan, William Arthur, 1893-1963. New York State College of Veterinary Medicine
